name: Diffusion Pseudotime (DPT)

root_cell_type.guidance: Name of the starting cell type (e.g., 'HSC', 'Neural progenitor'). The most stem-like cell is auto-selected via diffusion components.

root_cell_index.guidance: Explicit root cell index. Overrides root_cell_type.

n_dcs.guidance: Number of diffusion components. 10-20 is typical.

cell_type_key.guidance: obs key with cell type annotations.

validation.check: Check for infinite pseudotime values (disconnected lineages). If >5% cells have inf pseudotime, consider subsetting or lowering clustering resolution. [BP-2 Ch. 14]

notes: DPT orders cells along a developmental trajectory relative to a root cell. Requires neighbors computed and a root specification. PAGA should be run first for topology validation. DPT can inflate pseudotime for disconnected lineages — compare with Palantir if multiple lineages are present.
